analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that a meeting with former Afghan President Hamid Karzai took place and that China will continue to play a constructive role in the next stages of the Afghan peace process. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes. The claim that China will play a 'constructive role' in the Afghan peace process portrays China as cooperative, supportive of peace and stability—hallmarks of benevolence and constructive international engagement. CH3 (epic history): Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; focus is external role. CH5 (CCP government succeeds domestically/technologically): Not discussed. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2 only.
